name: Successful Green Chili Stew
recipeIngredient: 4 cans diced green chiles (7 oz each)
14 ounces canned peeled tomatoes with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground turkey in a large saucepan or Dutch oven. Add the garlic and sauté it with the meat just before it is done.
2. Turn the heat to medium high. Add the tomatoes with juice to the pan, breaking them up with a spatula. Then add the remaining vegetables (chiles, zucchini, water), corn, cumin, Italian seasoning, and salt.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce the heat and simmer until the zucchini is soft. Serve in bowls; this stew is better the next day.
